plugin_desc: Moxa 工业以太网交换机专用 SNMP 采集模板（MOXA-MIB，企业号 8691）。除标准 IF-MIB 64 位 HC 接口流量外，额外采集 Moxa 私有 OID 的设备健康指标：机箱温度（℃）以及双路电源输入状态（经 telegraf processors.enum 归一为 1=正常/2=异常）。Moxa 工业交换机多为无风扇被动散热设计且私有 MIB 未以无需行级过滤的标量形式暴露 CPU/内存负载，故 CPU/内存/风扇为 N/A。适用品牌型号——Moxa 工业网管交换机（EDS / IKS / ICS / SDS 系列，企业号 8691）。
name: Switch

metrics.name: interface_ifHCInOctets
metrics.description: This metric indicates the average rate of bytes received over the past 5 minutes, measured in bytes per second, from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCInOctets counter (ifXTable).

metrics.name: interface_ifHCOutOctets
metrics.description: This metric calculates the average rate of bytes sent over the past 5 minutes, measured in bytes per second, from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCOutOctets counter (ifXTable).

metrics.name: device_temperature_celsius
metrics.description: Chassis temperature of the Moxa industrial switch in degrees Celsius (MOXA-MIB private OID).

metrics.name: device_psu_state
metrics.description: Power-input state of the Moxa industrial switch (dual redundant power inputs), normalised to 1=normal / 2=abnormal.
